title: Pink Scythe
description: A cooler texture for a netherite sword!
body:
This retextures a netherite sword! If you're playing on a lower version, disregard the warning it will still work. 

If you want a version where you need to rename it for the texture to change then please reach out to my Discord (**levantinerosie**)

DISCLAIMER:
- Anyone can use this but PLEASE give credit if distributed or used for public content!
- Do not repost claiming it as your own work!
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a12a2fcd2687d204d8d51e34ba6e13033ce391d_0.webp)
